content.verdict: Deplar Farm is the ultra-luxury outlier on Iceland's hotel map — an Eleven Experience lodge with only 13 suites in the remote Fljót Valley of far-north Iceland, reachable by private helicopter or a scenic drive from Akureyri. It is all-inclusive at the full 'private guide, private helicopter, bring your own dream' level: heli-skiing into untouched Troll Peninsula couloirs in winter, fly-fishing for Atlantic salmon on the Fljótaá river in summer, surfing in dry suits off Arctic beaches, horseback rides into midnight-sun valleys, and an indoor-outdoor geothermal pool with a swim-up bar inside a turf-roofed main lodge. Suites are big, warm, timber-lined rooms with soaking tubs; the spa has a float tank and a Finnish sauna; the kitchen sources from the surrounding valley and the Greenland Sea. It is expensive in a way few hotels on Earth are — and for couples planning a once-in-a-lifetime honeymoon, very few properties deliver more.
content.best_room: Farmhouse Suite — a 60+ square meter timber-clad suite with a king bed, soaking tub, private sitting area, and valley views, with full all-inclusive access to guides, food, and heli-time add-ons.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Arrival via Akureyri
itinerary_7_nights.description: Fly into Keflavík, connect to Akureyri, and transfer by helicopter or 4x4 to Deplar Farm. Check-in, orientation with your guides, and a first geothermal soak under the northern sky.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Heli-ski or valley hike
itinerary_7_nights.description: In ski season, helicopter to Troll Peninsula couloirs for untouched backcountry descents; in summer, a guided hike to a hidden waterfall, followed by spa treatments.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Salmon fishing or sea kayak
itinerary_7_nights.description: Fly-fishing on the Fljótaá for Atlantic salmon with a private guide, or a sea kayak into a quiet fjord spotting seals and puffins in season.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Horses, spa, and long dinner
itinerary_7_nights.description: Morning ride on Icelandic horses into the valley, afternoon float tank and couples massage, and a tasting-menu dinner with wines from the lodge cellar.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Arctic surf or ice-cave heli-day
itinerary_7_nights.description: Dry-suit surfing at a secret Arctic break in summer, or a heli-transfer to a blue ice cave on Langjökull in winter — each Deplar day is chef-planned and guide-led.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Wellness and yoga
itinerary_7_nights.description: A deliberate rest day — sunrise yoga, long pool floats with the swim-up bar, Nordic sauna circuit, and an early in-suite dinner in your robe.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Farewell and helicopter out
itinerary_7_nights.description: One last soak, brunch with the lodge team, and your scenic helicopter or road transfer back toward Akureyri and Keflavík.

caveats: Deplar Farm is genuinely remote — getting there is part of the experience, but expect a full travel day at each end via Akureyri or a private helicopter.
All-inclusive rates are high and guided activities (heli-skiing especially) can add meaningful supplements; discuss exactly what's bundled with reservations before confirming.
The lodge is not adults-only; however, Eleven Experience properties are designed around small groups and couples, and the atmosphere is almost always quiet and refined.

faqs.question: Is this hotel good for honeymooners?
faqs.answer: For adventurous, well-funded honeymooners, it is one of the single best hotels on Earth. Private guides, remote setting, geothermal swim-up bar, and an Eleven Experience standard of service make it unforgettable.

faqs.question: What is the best time to visit?
faqs.answer: February to April for heli-skiing and aurora, June to August for midnight-sun salmon fishing, sea kayaking, and horseback rides. Each season delivers a distinct honeymoon.

faqs.question: What should we book in advance?
faqs.answer: A Farmhouse Suite, any heli-skiing or fly-fishing add-ons, your Akureyri connection or helicopter transfer, and dietary requests for the kitchen team.

faqs.question: Is it adults-only?
faqs.answer: No, but with only 13 suites and an activity-driven rhythm it effectively behaves like an adults-only lodge most of the year, particularly on couple-focused dates.

faqs.question: What's the best room type for a honeymoon?
faqs.answer: A Farmhouse Suite is the signature honeymoon option. If you want maximum privacy, Eleven can often arrange exclusive-use buyouts for anniversaries and milestone trips.

faqs.question: How do we get there?
faqs.answer: Fly into Keflavík (KEF), connect to Akureyri on a short domestic flight, then transfer to Deplar Farm via private helicopter or a 4x4 drive. Eleven Experience handles all logistics.
